args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS OwnerId,
       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
